content: Agent definition files use a 6-section markdown format: Role, Responsibilities, Capabilities, Input Format, Output Format, Behavioral Guidelines. Each section provides structured context for the AI sub-agent.
jira-config.json uses env var references (JIRA_API_TOKEN, JIRA_EMAIL) rather than hardcoded credentials. Custom fields map logical names to Jira field IDs to avoid hardcoding in agent prompts.

description:
Agent: coordinator
Capability: coordinator
Failure reason: Process terminated
Detected by: Tier 0 (process death)
